meta.name: Simple2
meta.description: Branch of Simple with corner-chaos in UL. UR: kick density (Y) + hihat density (X) @ 111 BPM. UL: half-tempo drum mirror @ 55.5 BPM with Portal-style granular send FX, PLUS corner-chaos at the far top-left of UL — on each UL hihat step: 50% reverse hihat / 20% octave-low hihat / 10% 32nd-note roll / otherwise normal; on each UL kick step: 33% reverse kick. All chaos probabilities scale linearly toward the opposite UL corner (BR of UL → 0%). BL: charlie. BR: rain. BL+BR crossfade and extend up into UL/UR via 2D audibility rectangles. Shares all sample assets with Simple.
